name: iTEKAD Micro-Enterprise Financing 2026
description: Pembiayaan mikro sehingga RM 50,000 untuk micro-enterprise yang nak naik taraf dari pushcart ke kiosk tetap. Disalurkan melalui Financial Institutions yang dilantik BNM.
eligibility: Pemilik perniagaan B40 atau micro-entrepreneur yang aktif
Sektor F&B, retail, atau perkhidmatan layak
Ada track record cashflow boleh disahkan (cth: TnG eWallet settlement data)

emailTemplate.subject: iTEKAD Application - {{businessName}} (RM 50,000 micro-financing)
emailTemplate.body:
Dear iTEKAD Team,

Submitting an application for micro-enterprise financing under iTEKAD on behalf of {{name}}, owner of {{businessName}} ({{location.city}}, {{location.state}}).

The full application pack is attached.

Best regards,
TNG Rise (on behalf of {{name}})
